subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou dost witness what Thou dost witness, how I am encompassed by the atoms of evil and allusions of vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک یا الهی تشهد ما تشهد فیما احاطتنی ذرات السوئیه و اشارات الظنونیه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @power of prayer, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
